title: Wracra Silver Grey Linen Table Runner 180cm Long Machine Washable Rustic Farmhouse Table Runner for Dining Holiday Parties and Everyday Use(Silver Grey, 180cm)
features: Size - 33 x 180 cm. Hand-crafted with the finest details. Available in different sizes and colors to fit your needs.

Material - Linen & polyester. Maintains the natural beauty of linen and advantage of polyester, anti-wrinkle, shrink-resistant and not easy to fade. Its weight and texture perfectly suited for spring, summer, autumn and winter.
Easy Care - Machine Washable, Low Iron as Needed, Steam Iron for a crisp look. Do not bleach.

Widely Application - Refresh the look of your otherwise plain table, impressing guests at your special event; This rustic and vintage table runner is perfect fit for dining table decor, dresser, family gathering, festivals, party and everyday use.

Tips - Please choose the appropriate length according to your table when purchasing.in addition, there may be a slight color difference due to the light and display screen, if you have any questions, please feel free to contact us, we'll be happy to help you.
description: Product Description About Us Wracra offers high-quality Kitchen and Home Improvement products with a wide variety of creative designs. We are always dedicated to creating new ideas within our product category. Committed to bestow Living innovation by adding quality products. Wracra will continue its purpose in focusing on customer-centricity, innovation, and economical products. We hope you'll enjoy our collections as much as we enjoyed creating them for you. Classic, Modern and Trendy Kitchen & Table Linens Refresh the look of your dining table Linen & polyester: Linen and polyester blend fabric, maintains the natural beauty of linen, but also gives play to the anti-wrinkle properties of polyester. Craft: Hand-crafted with the finest details, making each creation unique and natural rustic look. All the table linens were handcrafted by skilled artisans. How To Choose The Right Table Runner for Your Table Choose the color that suits you for different occasions Available in a wide range of colors and size, this collection mellows with age, laundering and use, bringing a vintage feel to each piece. Choose The Right-Size Table Runners Table runners Length = Table Length + 40 ~ 60 cm Each end drops approximately 20 ~30 cm That is, the length of the table plus 40 ~ 60 cm the length that suits your table. If it is a tea table, you only need to add 10 ~ 20 cm. Finest details Hand-stitched edges, making each creation unique and natural rustic look. All the table linens were handcrafted by skilled artisans. Easy to Care Machine Washable, Low Iron as Needed, Steam Iron for a crisp look. The fabric becomes softer and more relaxed after each wash. It also becomes more luxurious with time and use. Basic Hemmed Style for Any Occasion 33cm width basic linen style table runner, can be decorated for any occasion.. Available in colors , sizes and styles for celebrating weddings, bridal showers, baby showers and special occasions, entertaining for Valentine’s Day, St. Patrick’s Day, Easter, Passover, Memorial Day, 4th of July, Labor Day, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Hanukkah, Christmas and or any holiday celebrations.
